comments: Calling periodically from barley crop by turn to Doon Hill at top of long green lane between Meikle Pinkerton and Pinkerton hill. After 10 mins of silence I got out of the car and the bird took off and flew c50m into the field on the Doon hill side of the track.

comments: Osprey seen fishing over Threipmuir Reservoir.
A lot by the estuary, was getting dark and so difficult to give an accurate number.
3 perched on the top of Cragleith and the rest were seen swimming near our boat and flying past us.
Saw many perched on the cliffs of Craigleith and others swimming past our boat
Looped around Bass Rock in our boat and saw thousands on the island and hundreds flying around
